rules.description: Data protection section must be defined
rules.explanation: Policies must define how sensitive data is protected, encrypted, and handled in accordance with regulatory requirements.

rules.description: Access control section must be defined
rules.explanation: Policies must describe role-based access mechanisms and authentication controls.
Policies must define how long data is stored and when it must be deleted.

rules.description: Incident reporting process must be defined
rules.explanation: Policies must define how security incidents are detected, escalated, and reported.
